name: venissa-cafe
description: > **Premium cafe website for Venissa Cafe & Kitchen, LB Nagar, Hyderabad — built with React + Tailwind + Framer Motion + Node.js + MongoDB**

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c magenta,cyan "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run preview --prefix frontend"
